name: Astro Aerospace Ltd.
summary: Astro Aerospace Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops self-piloted and autonomous, manned and unmanned, electric vertical take-off and landing aerial vehicles. It intends to provide the market with aerial transportation for humans and cargo. The company was formerly known as CPSM, Inc. and changed its name to Astro Aerospace Ltd. in March 2018. Astro Aerospace Ltd. is headquartered in Lewisville, Texas. As of March 14, 2018, Astro Aerospace Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Maab Global Ltd.
